seoTitle: The Capital Wheel - Landmark Educational Tours
seoDescription: Located right outside of Washington DC, the capital wheel features views unlike any other of the nation's capital.
html:
Experience incomparable waterfront views of DC, Maryland and Virginia seated in comfortable, climate-controlled gondolas.

Create your own program or download our free Common Core Compliant Teacher Resource Guides:

  • Grade 6-8 The Wilson Connection
  • Grade 6-8 Overcoming Gravity
  • Grade 6-8 Moving Across the Potomac
  • Grade 9-12 The Wilson Connection
  • Grade 9-12 Overcoming Gravity
  • Grade 9-12 Moving Across the Potomac
  • Multi-Level Worksheet and Answer Guide
